message:
chore: update Cargo.lock (frankensqlite bump, windows-sys downgrades)

Cargo.lock changes from dependency resolution:

- frankensqlite (fsqlite-*) crates updated from commit e9b37da to
  f955253, picking up upstream fixes.
- windows-sys dependencies downgraded across several crates:
  anstyle → 0.60.2, dirs-sys → 0.59.0, errno → 0.52.0,
  parking_lot_core → 0.52.0, ring → 0.60.2, rustix → 0.52.0,
  socket2 → 0.52.0, tempfile → 0.52.0 (from 0.61.2).
  This resolves version conflicts introduced by the fsqlite update.
- tempfile switched from getrandom 0.4.2 to 0.3.4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
